parilaghu a.
1 Very light (lit.) (as clothes &c.).
2 Very light or easy to digest; kṣīṇaḥ kṣīṇaḥ parilaghu payaḥ srotasāṃ copabhujya  Me. 13. 
3 Very small;  U. 4. 21.
